# Robert Townsend

> Full-stack developer → AI agent architect. 15+ years. Two-time Amazonian. AWS SA Pro. Stanford ML.

## Identity
Name: Robert Townsend (Williams)
Email: rob@robhybrid.com
Phone: 512-565-3884
Location: Austin, TX 78723
GitHub: github.com/robhybrid
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/robert-townsend-b4313911
Web: robhybrid.com

## What I Do
I build AI agent systems and production web applications. My path from design (BFA) to multi-agent orchestration gives me unusual range — I've shipped HIPAA telehealth to hospitals, energy simulations to traders, and UI components to millions of AWS customers. I write code that writes code.

## Key Numbers
- 60% reduction in task completion time via multi-agent AI orchestration
- 2 production MCP servers (15+ tools each)
- 20+ AI agent configurations managed
- 50% reduction in manual code review overhead
- 100% security vulnerability closure at TotalEnergies
- $1M+ raised for nonprofits via digital fundraising
- 6.5 years leading HIPAA-compliant telehealth development

## Stack
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL, C, C++, PHP, R, Bash
Frontend: React, D3, Three.js, WebGL, Cloudscape, Angular
Backend: Node.js, FastAPI, Django, Flask
AWS: Bedrock, Lambda, S3, CloudFront, API Gateway, DynamoDB, CloudFormation
AI/ML: Bedrock, MCP Servers, Multi-Agent Orchestration, RAG, TensorFlow, scikit-learn
DevOps: Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Terraform, Prometheus, Grafana
Testing: Vitest, Jest, Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium

## Career (most recent first)

2. TotalEnergies — Full-Stack Developer (Apr 2024 – Jun 2025)
3. Airstrip Technologies — Lead Web App Developer (Jun 2017 – Jan 2024)
4. Amazon — SDE, Mobile Device Management (Jun 2016 – May 2017)
5. Mutual Mobile — Senior Web Developer (Oct 2012 – May 2016)
6–11. Projekt202, Simply Interactive, Perficient, BazaarVoice, Heatwave Interactive, Charity Dynamics (2008–2012)
